name: @gonzih/cc-agent-ui
description: Live canvas UI for cc-agent jobs — infinite canvas, streaming output, file browser

scripts.test: node --test test/pure.test.js test/redis-ops.test.js test/utils.test.js test/redis-helpers.test.js test/fs-handlers.test.js && vitest run test/data-access.test.js test/helpers.test.js
